nanoBananaStyleSuffix: Style needs to match the style, perspective, tone and image size of the attached images. Images are designed for simple movements like paper dolls.

factionAnatomy.the_croak: green spotted frog skin, webbed hands, amphibian features
factionAnatomy.koala_horde: grey fur, round ears, stubby paws, koala features

sceneOverrides.marsh_tyrant: a large toad tyrant with a tiny crown being carried by smaller frogs beneath him, green spotted frog skin, accent #f97316
